name: Eckrich Smokey Sausage Saute'
recipeIngredient: 2 medium zucchini, cut in half lengthwise and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add the sausage and cook until browned, about 4-5 minutes.
2. Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
3. Add margarine to the skillet. Stir in zucchini and onion. Cook until zucchini is crisp-tender.
4. Return the sausage to the skillet. Add garlic salt, oregano, and pepper; stir to mix.
5. Add tomatoes and continue cooking until hot. Serve the sausage and zucchini mixture over pasta or rice.
6. Makes 5 servings.
